🌌 Scenes: Introduce Nivana and Adelle (../Scenes/Introduce%20Nivana%20and%20Adelle%2090a5c6953ff5423ba7cc1a40c8540322.md), Mediev family conversation (../Scenes/Mediev%20family%20conversation%202aa58e628ba2806cb21cfcd50621bcfb.md)

Initially Adelle is presented as a nameless maid.

Eventually her need is brought up in conversation.

I like the idea of her introducing herself to [The Nurse](../Data/Characters/The%20Nurse%20ae7cf88e2f574b81aa0e515dc0b8a1e5.md).
